title: ipv6_addr.c includes zephyr/logging/log.h but has no LOG_MODULE_REGISTER guard
description:
ipv6_addr.c:17 includes zephyr/logging/log.h and line 21 does LOG_MODULE_REGISTER.

This file is documented as 'does not depend on Zephyr's networking stack' (ipv6_addr.h:17-18) but it unconditionally uses Zephyr logging.

What goes wrong: The ipv6_addr module cannot be used in a non-Zephyr build (e.g., host-side unit tests) without stubbing the logging system. The header comment implies portability that doesn't exist in the implementation.

Fix: Either (1) update the header comment to note Zephyr dependency, or (2) make logging conditional with fallback to printf/noop for non-Zephyr builds.
close_reason: Fixed: made logging conditional with __ZEPHYR__ guard - falls back to no-op macros for host builds; also wrapped BUILD_ASSERT in same guard with _Static_assert fallback
